message:
refactor(gui): reorder launcher to show sessions before domains

Extract session and domain entry building into pure helper functions
(build_session_domain_entries, session_entry_label, domain_entry_label,
domain_connection_label) and reorder the launcher overlay so session
rows appear first. Labels improved to show connection state explicitly:
"Session [current]:" / "Domain [connected]:" / "Domain [detached]:".

Two unit tests verify ordering invariants and domain preselection.
Help text updated to "Enter=switch/open". User guide documents the
new layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,6 +108,8 @@ Default session-manager entry point:
 
 - `Cmd+S` opens the session manager launcher (workspace/domain/session switch surface).
 - Session rows include active/current marker plus window and pane counts.
+- Session rows are listed before domain and command-palette rows so the overlay opens session-first.
+- Domain rows surface the current mux connection state (`connected` or `detached`).
 
 Global launch options:
